title: QR Code Model 2 special zone placements for versions 1 through 10

coordinate_system.origin: top-left module of the QR symbol matrix, excluding quiet zone
coordinate_system.x: column index, increasing left to right
coordinate_system.y: row index, increasing top to bottom
coordinate_system.rectangles: Every rectangle uses integer x, y, width, height. Coordinates are 0-based and width/height are counts of modules.
coordinate_system.quiet_zone_note: Quiet-zone rectangles intentionally use negative x/y or x/y equal to module_count because they surround, but are not inside, the QR matrix.

scope.qr_model: QR Code Model 2 / standard QR Code
not_included: actual dark/light values for format and version information bits
actual mask formula results over data modules

format_information_bit_indexing.format_string: 15-bit final masked format information string, written MSB to LSB as indices 0..14.
format_information_bit_indexing.placement_index_note: Physical placement in this file also records placement_lsb_index i=0..14; format_string_msb_index = 14 - i. Each bit has two physical instances/copies.

version_information_bit_indexing.version_string: 18-bit version information string for versions 7 and above, written MSB to LSB as indices 0..17.
version_information_bit_indexing.placement_index_note: Physical placement records placement_lsb_index i=0..17; version_string_msb_index = 17 - i. Each bit has two physical instances/copies.

drawing_notes: Function patterns and reserved information areas are not masked. The selected QR mask pattern is applied only to data/error-correction codeword modules.
Alignment patterns may overlap timing-pattern lines; their modules are designed to coincide with the timing pattern where this happens.
For hand drawing, the quiet zone must stay blank/light around the entire symbol.
